opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These purple bumps on my wrists itch so badly I've scratched my skin raw, and I haven't slept in two days. I'm scared it's a parasite I can spread.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch is unbearable and I need to know if it's contagious.

symptom_narrative.character: itchy purple flat-topped bumps, some with fine white lines
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: scratched raw with pinpoint bleeding; no fever; no new soaps/medications

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no household contacts itching

objective_data_offered.value: purple, flat-topped shiny bumps on both wrists and ankles, some with fine white lacy lines on top; older ones leaving dark marks; a few scratched raw; no lines between fingers
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot confirm burrows/dermoscopy or biopsy remotely
